tasks.subject: BO-batch Task 0: 4 pages (Categories/Customers/Modules/Carriers) + structural test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Four BO pages (Common + v7/v8/v9 stubs) + extended browser-free structural test.

**Files:** src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/{Categories,Customers,Modules,Carriers}/Page.php, v{7,8,9} stubs (12), tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php

**Verify:** vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Categories/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Customers/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Modules/Page.php", "src/Pages/Common/BackOffice/Carriers/Page.php", "tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "vendor/bin/phpunit tests/Unit/Pages/BackOfficeNavigationTest.php", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 pages resolve v7/v8/v9 + declare menu", "Customers coexists with Customer", "composer test-unit green"]}
```

tasks.subject: BO-batch Task 1: 4 test suites
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One BO suite per new controller (login → goTo → assert title).

**Files:** src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/{Categories,Customers,Modules,Carriers}.php

**Verify:** php -l on the 4 suites && composer test-unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Categories.php", "src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Customers.php", "src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Modules.php", "src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Carriers.php"], "verifyCommand": "php -l src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Categories.php && php -l src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Customers.php && php -l src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Modules.php && php -l src/Tests/Suites/BackOffice/Carriers.php && composer test-unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 suites login+goTo+assert", "php -l clean", "test-unit green"]}
```
